data.title: RED test: cross-link verification test for skill/agent files referencing schema + runbook
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context
This task writes the structural boundary test that verifies cross-links from relevant skill/agent instruction files to the stage-boundary-preconditions schema reference and ops runbook. The test fails RED before T4 adds the cross-links.

## TDD Requirement
Write `tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-cross-links.sh`:
- Given: relevant skill/agent files do not yet contain cross-links to stage-boundary-preconditions docs
- When: the test checks each file for a reference to `docs/designs/stage-boundary-preconditions/schema-reference.md` or the docs directory
- Then: test fails (RED) because no cross-links have been added

Named failing tests:
- `test_preplanning_skill_links_to_preconditions_docs` — asserts `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md` contains a reference to `stage-boundary-preconditions`
- `test_sprint_skill_links_to_preconditions_docs` — asserts `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` contains a reference to `stage-boundary-preconditions`
- `test_implementation_plan_skill_links_to_preconditions_docs` — asserts `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md` contains a reference to `stage-boundary-preconditions`
- `test_commit_workflow_links_to_preconditions_docs` — asserts `plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md` contains a reference to `stage-boundary-preconditions`
- `test_completion_verifier_links_to_preconditions_docs` — asserts `plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md` contains a reference to `stage-boundary-preconditions`
- `test_harvest_worktree_links_to_preconditions_docs` — asserts `plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh` contains a reference to `stage-boundary-preconditions`
- `test_merge_to_main_links_to_preconditions_docs` — asserts `plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh` contains a reference to `stage-boundary-preconditions`

## Implementation Notes
- Use `grep -q "stage-boundary-preconditions"` as the check — minimal structural assertion per Rule 5
- Set executable bit: `chmod +x tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-cross-links.sh`
- Each test checks presence of the cross-link reference, not the link text

## File Impact
- `tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-cross-links.sh` — Create

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-cross-links.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-cross-links.sh
- [ ] Test file contains all 7 named test functions
  Verify: grep -c "test_.*_links_to_preconditions" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-cross-links.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] Test exits non-zero when cross-links are absent (confirms RED phase)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-stage-boundary-preconditions-cross-links.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_preplanning_skill_links_to_preconditions_docs] for plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_preplanning_skill_links_to_preconditions_docs\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
